docket_entries.description: NOT REPORTED. INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-10-2025, IN DEPT. 304, IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR PENDING COORDINATION WITH JCCP 5188 OR NOTICE FROM COUNSEL THAT THIS CASE WILL NOT BE COORDINATED WITH JCCP 5188. (D304)
